== Notes for [[Item:Q105378|Q105378]] ==

43. ANTONIA4 DE MORALES (RODRIGO3 DE MORALES-TREVINO, JUANA2 DE TREVINO-QUINTANILLA-Y-SALAZAR, PEDRO1 DE SALAZAR)
*She married CAPTAIN MARTIN DE ARISPE, son of JUAN DE ARISPE and LEONOR GUTIERREZ-MARTINEZ-DE-SALAZAR.

Children of ANTONIA DE MORALES and MARTIN DE ARISPE are:
*1. i. MARIA5 DE ARISPE-MORALES,
**b. Saltillo, Coahuila, Mexico;
**m. NICOLAS FLORES-DE-ABREGO, 25 Aug 1718, Saltillo, Coahulia, Mexico;
***b. 1698, Saltillo, Coahuila, Mexico.
****Marriage Notes for MARIA DE ARISPE-MORALES and NICOLAS FLORES-DE-ABREGO: Marriage source:Index to the Marriage Investigations of the Diocese of Guadalajara by Raul J. Guerra, Jr., Nadine M. Vasquez, Baldomero Vela, Jr. Page 62.
*2. ii. JOSEPH-MARTIN DE ARISPE-MORALES,
**m. MARIA FERNANDEZ.
*3. iii. ELENA ARISPE-MORALES,
**b. 1679, Saltillo, Coahuila, Mexico;
**m. ALONSO BARBA-GONZALEZ, 28 Sep 1697, Saltillo, Coahulia, Mexico;
***b. 1675, Saltillo, Coahuila, Mexico.

http://www.somosprimos.com/inclan/salazar.htm
--------------------
=== GEDCOM Note ===
(Research):http://www.somosprimos.com/inclan/salazar.htm&nbsp; n.43

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000001237719569

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
